expectedQuestions.decisionValue: bookPageSplit → different min/page for Zumdahl vs review book, changes time calc. If unknown, use Zumdahl ~400p + Review ~200p estimate. labExperience → FRQ lab-based question prep decision [v2].

zumdahl.citation: CAT Understand; Many New Concepts = 6.0; AP Chem equations+reactions+experiments density; v4 range 4.0-6.5

review_book.citation: Review book = summary. ~45% of original textbook speed.

expectedStrategy: 2 separate plans: Zumdahl + Review Book (different min/page — must NOT merge)
3-phase: Phase1(4wks) Zumdahl main + Review parallel → Phase2(2wks) AP Review intensive + FRQ start → Phase3(1wk) mock MCQ 60q/90min + FRQ drill 7q/105min
Total needed ~2800min vs available 4410min (90min × 49days) → 1610min surplus ✅ — FRQ + MCQ sets add-in possible
AP format essential: MCQ 60q/90min + FRQ 7q/105min — FRQ = separate track from Month 2
toneExpectation: confidence-building for first AP — 'Science 강점이라 좋아. 근데 AP는 형식 연습이 내용만큼 중요해.'
